reviews.review_title: A lot of content and surprisingly smooth
reviews.review_description: There are plenty of arena shooters but that doesn’t mean there’s no room for a good new one. Loved the idea of throwing empty gun to damage the enemies. Reminds me of Tediore weapons from Boarderlands. It’s nice to see that arenas not just decorations but have various gameplay rules. Good luck on release!

reviews.review_title: Pretty cool game! The demo level was fun
reviews.review_description:
Voice acting’s great, and the mobs are funny. The boss took me a few tries, but I got him in the end.
Love the idea of mixing magic with guns, didn’t expect that to work so well!
